title: Chromatin enrichment for proteomics.
author: Kustatscher G Wills KL Furlan C Rappsilber J
content: S-EPMC4300392 PMC4300392 Chromatin enrichment for proteomics. During interphase, chromatin hosts fundamental cellular processes, such as gene expression, DNA replication and DNA damage repair.
